text: What is the writer's carpet made of?
zh: 写作者的地毯是用什么做的?

text: We have just moved into a new house and I have been working hard all morning.
zh: 我们刚搬进新家,我整个上午都在忙。

text: I have been trying to get my new room in order.
zh: 我一直在努力整理我的新房间。

text: This has not been easy because I own over a thousand books.
zh: 这可不容易,因为我有一千多本书。

text: so I have temporarily put my books on the floor.
zh: 所以我暂时把书都放在了地板上。

text: At the moment, they cover every inch of floor space
zh: 此刻,它们铺满了地板上的每一寸空间,

text: and I actually have to walk on them to get in or out of the room.
zh: 我进出房间时甚至得踩在书上走。

text: A short while ago, my sister helped me to carry one of my old bookcases up the stairs.
zh: 不久前,我妹妹帮我把一个旧书架搬上了楼。

text: She went into my room and got a big surprise when she saw all those books on the floor.
zh: 她走进我的房间,看到地板上那些书时大吃一惊。

text: 'This is the prettiest carpet I have ever seen,' she said.
zh: 她说:'这是我见过最漂亮的地毯了。'

text: She gazed at it for some time then added,
zh: 她盯着看了一会儿,又补充道,

text: You can sit here in your spare time and read the carpet!'
zh: 你闲暇时可以坐在这儿,读读这地毯!'
